details.quote: We collect, use, and disclose information through the use of cookies, tracking pixels, SDKs, Google Analytics, and other third-party tracking technologies for security and authentication, to understand and improve your experience, perform analytics, inform and serve relevant ads, understand how you interact with ads, and allow you to navigate and use our Services.

mentions_legales.quote:

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Présence d'une politique de confidentialité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: This Privacy Policy (“Policy”) describes how we collect, share, and use your personal information, as well as how to exercise your privacy rights and choices.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Identité du Responsable de Traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: **Data Controller**: If you are in the EEA, Strava Ireland Limited provides the Services to you. Otherwise, Strava, Inc. provides the Services to you.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Coordonnées du DPO
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: If you are in the EEA or the UK and have any questions or requests about your legal rights, you can also contact our Data Protection Officer at __DPO@strava.com__.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Types de données collectées + raison
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
**Account Information**: We collect account information such as your name, email address, phone number, date of birth, gender, username, and password.

**Profile Information**: We collect information you provide about yourself, such as your photo, weight, preferred sport type(s), fitness goals, and level of experience.

**Activity Data**: We collect Activity Data directly or through third-party integrations you configure. “Activity Data” is information about the activities you record or upload to Strava, such as equipment usage, date, time, distance, speed, pace, perceived exertion, power, cadence, and geolocation information.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Base légale du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
- Contract: When processing personal information is necessary to perform our contract with you (our Terms) or to take steps at your request before entering into a contract. 
- Consent: When you’ve given us permission to use your information for a specific reason. You have the right to withdraw your consent at any time. 
- Legitimate interests: When we use your information in ways that are expected and that do not unfairly affect your rights. 
- Legal obligation: When we’re required to process your information by law. 
- Vital interests: When processing is needed to protect someone’s life or safety.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Caractère obligatoire/facultatif + conséquences
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: For our core features to function (e.g., GPS activity tracking, routes, segments), you must grant us permission through your device to track your device’s precise location.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Durée de conservation des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We retain information as long as needed to provide the Services, subject to our legal obligations. We generally keep information associated with your account until you delete it or we no longer need the information to provide the Services.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Destinataires des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We may share your information with third parties to support, improve, promote, and secure the Services; process payments; or fulfill orders. These service providers only have access to the information necessary to perform specified functions on our behalf.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Prise de décision automatisée
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We sometimes use AI Features and automated decision-making to analyze your personal information, as described above. But we do not use these technologies for decisions that have legal or similarly significant effects on you.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Sécurité des données (art. 32 RGPD)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We implement measures to manage your information securely and consistently with this Policy. We maintain administrative, technical, and physical safeguards in accordance with appropriate industry standards that are designed to protect against unauthorized use, disclosure, or access to personal information.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : catégories concernées
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
**Connected Devices and Apps**: We collect information (including Activity Data) from devices and apps you choose to connect to Strava, such as your Garmin device, Peloton account, or Apple Health app.

**Third-Party Accounts**: You can sign up and log in to the Services using accounts with other businesses, such as Google or Apple (“Third-Party Accounts”). If you access the Services through Third-Party Accounts, we will collect information such as your name, email address, profile information, and preferences.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : source des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
**Connected Devices and Apps**: We collect information (including Activity Data) from devices and apps you choose to connect to Strava, such as your Garmin device, Peloton account, or Apple Health app.

**Third-Party Accounts**: You can sign up and log in to the Services using accounts with other businesses, such as Google or Apple (“Third-Party Accounts»).

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'introduire une plainte (CNIL)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You may also have the right to complain to your local data protection supervisory authority.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit de rectification
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You may have the right to correct inaccurate information. You may correct, amend, or update Profile Information or Account Information at any time by adjusting that information in your account settings.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'accès
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You may have the right to know, and request access to, the personal information we collect, use, share, or otherwise process about you. You can access much of your information by logging into your account.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à l'effacement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You may have the right to restrict or delete personal information. You can restrict or delete much of your information through your account, such as deleting content like photos or videos you have posted, removing individual activities from view, or deleting your account.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la limitation du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You may have the right to restrict or delete personal information.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la portabilité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You may have the right to know, and request access to, the personal information we collect, use, share, or otherwise process about you. To download your data, including your activity files, follow the instructions __here__.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'opposition
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: In addition, you have the right to object to, and seek restriction of, our processing of your personal information based on our legitimate interests or the performance of a task carried out in the public interest.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Date de dernière mise à jour de la politique
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Effective Date: January 1, 2026

cookies.label: Présence d'une politique cookies
cookies.quote: Learn more about how we use cookies and manage your preferences by visiting our __Cookie Policy__.

cookies.label: Retrait du consentement simple et à tout moment
Information sur le Responsable de Traitement
cookies.quote: **Data Controller**: If you are in the EEA, Strava Ireland Limited provides the Services to you. Otherwise, Strava, Inc. provides the Services to you.

cookies.label: Finalité des cookies (claire et complète)
cookies.quote: We collect, use, and disclose information through the use of cookies and similar technologies for security and authentication, to understand and improve your experience, perform analytics, inform and serve relevant ads, understand how you interact with ads, and allow you to navigate and use our Services.

cookies.label: Détail des finalités (2e niveau)
cookies.quote: We collect, use, and disclose information through the use of cookies, tracking pixels, SDKs, Google Analytics, and other third-party tracking technologies for security and authentication, to understand and improve your experience, perform analytics, inform and serve relevant ads, understand how you interact with ads, and allow you to navigate and use our Services.

cookies.label: Détail des types de cookies déposés
Outil de mesure d'audience mentionné
cookies.quote: Specific to Google Analytics, you can find more information in Google’s explanation at “__How Google uses information from sites or apps that use our services__”.

transferts_hors_ue.label: Existence de transferts hors UE + destinataires
transferts_hors_ue.quote: If you are located outside of the United States and choose to use the Services or provide information to us, you acknowledge and understand that your information will be transferred, processed, and stored in the United States.

transferts_hors_ue.label: Stockage cloud hors UE + localisation serveurs
